data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond returns to growth in Q1, citing omnichannel success and home services
data.description: The retailer's acquisitions of Kirkland's and The Container Store stand to play significant roles as their owner rethinks merchandising and use of their spaces.

data.title: Health-E Commerce partners with Talkspace on mental health counseling offer
data.description: The partnership would allow Health-E Commerce consumers — via FSA Store and HSA Store — to use pretax spending options to purchase virtual mental health counseling through Talkspace.

data.title: Carve Designs' online sales growth, operations factor into acquisition
data.description: One of its cofounders shared with Digital Commerce 360 how the brand has approached growing its ecommerce sales, other channels it sells through, and why it accepted a deal to be acquired.

data.title: Colgate-Palmolive syndicates product data across sellers
data.description: The consumer brand manufacturer now distributes its product content — which can vary from images to written descriptions and attributes — to its network of physical stores simultaneously rather than individually.

data.title: VF Corporation adds inventory visibility technology from Nedap
data.description: The Nedap rollout will help VF Corporation brands — such as The North Face, Vans and Timberland — with omnichannel capabilities.
